title: Pitcairnia bifrons
taxonomy: Pitcairnia bifrons is a species within the genus Pitcairnia and the family Bromeliaceae. The family Bromeliaceae is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas. This plant belongs to the order Poales, which includes a wide variety of monocots. The classification of Pitcairnia bifrons can be summarized as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Poales, Family: Bromeliaceae, Genus: Pitcairnia, Species: P. bifrons. Further research may provide more detailed information about the specific classification of this species.
